author: dexhunter
name: Non-record: PR1953 K+O-only TTT + QK_GAIN_INIT=5.35
blurb: Clean PR #1953-family follow-up. Seed 42 reached 1.05767136 val_bpb, but 3-seed mean was 1.05857803, so this is submitted as a non-record reproducibility and variance finding rather than a record claim.
description: PR #1953-style stack with phased score-first TTT restricted to K and O LoRA adapters only, MLP LoRA disabled, EVAL_SEQ_LEN=2688, TTT_EVAL_SEQ_LEN=2688, TTT_LOCAL_LR_MULT=0.75, and QK_GAIN_INIT=5.35. All three seeds fit the 16MB artifact cap and 600s eval cap, but the 3-seed mean did not justify a record submission.
key_changes: PR #1953-family long-context score-first phased TTT stack
TTT restricted to K and O LoRA adapters
non_record_reason: Seed 42 was strong, but the 3-seed mean was not record-worthy under the open clean frontier.
